task: Benedict warned Christopher about the icy stairs. He had nearly fallen down them earlier that morning.
The painting hung above the fireplace mantel. It had been a wedding gift from her grandmother.
implementations: The pronoun "It" refers to "the fireplace mantel".

task: Cassandra coached Paloma for the tournament. She had won the regional title three years in a row.
The bridge connected the two islands across the bay. It had been engineered to withstand strong typhoons.
Reginald borrowed the saw from Patrick. He returned it the same evening after finishing the small project.
The dancer rehearsed the routine on the stage. She perfected every transition through long hours of practice.
Solomon helped Benjamin with the calculations. He was a retired accountant with decades of experience.
The book sat unopened on the nightstand. It had been on her reading list for many months already.
Evangeline persuaded Florence to attend. She convinced her with a heartfelt and patient explanation.
